Package org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic

Class RestClient.DefaultBuilder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.Context.Builder<SELF>
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingContextable.Builder<SELF>
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic.RestClient.Builder<RestClient.DefaultBuilder>
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic.RestClient.DefaultBuilder
Enclosing class:
RestClient
public static final class RestClient.DefaultBuilder extends RestClient.Builder<RestClient.DefaultBuilder>
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed RestClient.create() / RestClient.copy() path.
